extract-pdf-text-sentences-per-page.title: Extract PDF Text and Save Each Sentence on Separate Pages
extract-pdf-text-sentences-per-page.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF, split it into individual sentences, and write each sentence to its own page using TextFragment objects.

rotate-pdf-form-field-appearance.title: Rotate a PDF Form Field Appearance
rotate-pdf-form-field-appearance.description: Shows how to locate a form field, rotate its rectangle, add a rotated appearance stream, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-multiple-keywords-pdf.title: Batch Replace Multiple Keywords in PDF Using a Config File
batch-replace-multiple-keywords-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load old‑new string mappings from a configuration file and replace all occurrences of each keyword across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fuzzy-text-search-pdf.title: Fuzzy Text Search in PDF with Levenshtein Distance
fuzzy-text-search-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate approximate text matches in a PDF by extracting all text fragments and applying a Levenshtein distance filter.

add-text-at-specific-coordinates-to-pdf-.title: Add Text at Specific Coordinates to a PDF Page
add-text-at-specific-coordinates-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a TextFragment, positioning it at given X/Y coordinates, and saving the modified document.

insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert Identical Text on All PDF Pages
insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add the same plain text to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragment and TextBuilder.

load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory-stream.title: Load Custom TrueType Font from Memory Stream and Apply to PDF Text
load-custom-ttf-font-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates reading a TrueType font into a MemoryStream, opening it with Aspose.Pdf's FontRepository, and assigning the font to a TextFragment's TextState for rendering in a PDF document.

apply-custom-opentype-font-to-pdf.title: Apply Custom OpenType Font to PDF Text
apply-custom-opentype-font-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OTF font, embed it, and apply it to a TextFragment for styled PDF output.

set-character-spacing-in-pdf-text.title: Set Character Spacing for PDF Text
set-character-spacing-in-pdf-text.description: Demonstrates how to adjust inter‑character gaps by setting the CharacterSpacing property on a TextState of a TextFragment, and saves the PDF with platform‑aware GDI+ handling.

add-left-aligned-text-to-pdf.title: Add Left-Aligned Text to PDF
add-left-aligned-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a text fragment into a PDF and align it to the left margin using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

center-text-on-pdf-page.title: Center Text on PDF Page
center-text-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to center a text fragment on a PDF page by setting the TextState's HorizontalAlignment to Center, with optional styling such as font size, font type, and color.

right-align-text-in-pdf.title: Right Align Text in PDF
right-align-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Right, with optional font settings and platform‑aware saving.

create-multi-line-text-paragraph.title: Create Multi-Line Text Paragraph in PDF
create-multi-line-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to build a multi‑line TextParagraph, configure its layout, and render it onto a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-clickable-hyperlink-into-pdf-text.title: Insert Clickable Hyperlink into PDF Text
insert-clickable-hyperlink-into-pdf-text.description: Shows how to add a clickable web hyperlink to a PDF by creating a TextSegment, assigning a WebHyperlink, and appending it to a page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-styled-html-fragment-to-pdf-page.title: Add Styled HTML Fragment to PDF Page
add-styled-html-fragment-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a styled HTML fragment into a PDF page using HtmlFragment and an optional TextState for default styling.

add-image-footnote-to-pdf.title: Add Image Footnote to PDF Page
add-image-footnote-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a footnote on a PDF page and insert an image into its Paragraphs collection using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-inside-footnote.title: Add a Table Inside a Footnote in a PDF
add-table-inside-footnote.description: Shows how to create a footnote containing a table and attach it to a text fragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-formatted-endnote.title: Insert Formatted Endnote with Bold and Italic Text
insert-formatted-endnote.description: Shows how to add an endnote to a text fragment and apply bold and italic formatting using a TextState in Aspose.Pdf.

inline-text-image-paragraph.title: Create Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
inline-text-image-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextFragment and an Image as inline elements within the same paragraph, producing a combined text‑image line in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.title: Add Invisible Tooltip Button Over Text in PDF
add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.description: Shows how to locate specific text in a PDF and overlay an invisible button field that acts as a tooltip using Aspose.Pdf actions.

find-phrase-occurrences-in-pdf.title: Find Phrase Occurrences in PDF using TextFragmentAbsorber
find-phrase-occurrences-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific phrase across all pages of a PDF, collect each matching TextFragment with its page number, and display its text and bounding rectangle.

replace-text-preserve-formatting.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-preserve-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF, replace it with new text, and keep the original font, size, and color using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header to All PDF Pages
add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to loop through a PDF's Pages collection and add a header string to each page using Aspose.Pdf's HeaderFooter and TextFragment objects.

add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Footer to PDF
add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a footer containing page numbers on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkAnnotation and TextState.

rotate-text-in-pdf.title: Rotate Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
rotate-text-in-pdf.description: The example opens an existing PDF, adds a new page, creates a TextFragment, sets its position, font, size, rotates it 45 degrees via TextState.Rotation, and saves the modified document.

apply-background-color-to-text.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
apply-background-color-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color for a text fragment using the TextState property before adding it to a PDF page, and saves the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

set-font-size-color-textfragment.title: Set Font Size and Color for TextFragment
set-font-size-color-textfragment.description: Demonstrates how to define a font size and custom RGB color using a TextFragment's TextState, add the styled fragment to a PDF page, and save the document with platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.title: Add Text to PDF from Memory Stream
add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, inserting a text fragment on the first page, and writing the modified PDF back to another stream using Aspose.Pdf.

save-modified-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Save Modified PDF to Byte Array
save-modified-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation on the first page, and returns the modified document as a byte array using a memory stream.

add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.title: Add Text and Encrypt PDF with Password
add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a text fragment to the first page, then encrypts the document with user and owner passwords using AES‑256 and specific permissions before saving.

add-underlined-text-to-pdf.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF
add-underlined-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, enable underlining via TextState.Underline, and save the modified document.

create-strikethrough-text-pdf.title: Create Strikethrough Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-strikethrough-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates enabling the TextState.StrikeOut property of a TextFragment to render strikethrough text and saving the PDF, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

render-subscript-text-pdf.title: Render Subscript Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
render-subscript-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding normal and subscript text fragments, setting the Subscript property (negative rise) and positioning them with TextBuilder.

set-custom-line-spacing-pdf-text.title: Set Custom Line Spacing for PDF Text
set-custom-line-spacing-pdf-text.description: Demonstrates how to adjust line spacing (leading) for added text in a PDF by configuring the TextState's LineSpacing property and applying it to a TextParagraph.

adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.description: Shows how to increase the spacing between words by setting the TextState.WordSpacing property of a TextFragment before adding it to a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

justify-text-in-pdf.title: Justify Text in PDF Using TextFragment
justify-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to justify a block of text across the page width by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Justify on a TextFragment, and saves the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

add-rtl-arabic-text-to-pdf.title: Add Right-to-Left Arabic Text to PDF
add-rtl-arabic-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting Arabic text with right‑to‑left direction into a PDF, creating the file if it does not exist and configuring the appropriate font and TextState settings.

add-bidirectional-text-to-pdf.title: Add Bidirectional Text to PDF
add-bidirectional-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert right‑to‑left (RTL) text such as Arabic into a PDF by using a Unicode RTL mark and configuring the TextState with a suitable font.

set-custom-line-height-for-pdf-text.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
set-custom-line-height-for-pdf-text.description: Shows how to assign a custom line height (line spacing) to a TextFragment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-kerning-for-textfragment.title: Enable Kerning for TextFragment in PDF
enable-kerning-for-textfragment.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment, simulates kerning by adjusting character spacing, sets font and position, appends the text to the first page, and saves the modified document.

enable-ligatures-when-adding-text-to-pdf.title: Enable Ligatures When Adding Text to PDF
enable-ligatures-when-adding-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure a TextState with a font that supports ligatures, create a TextFragment using that state, position it on a page, and save the document, noting that ligature rendering is handled automatically by the renderer.

enable-hyphenation-long-words.title: Enable Hyphenation for Long Words in PDF
enable-hyphenation-long-words.description: Demonstrates how to automatically hyphenate long words in a PDF by configuring the TextParagraph's formatting options and using TextBuilder to add the paragraph to a page.

embed-css-htmlfragment-pdf.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for Styled PDF Output
embed-css-htmlfragment-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, line height, and margins, and rendering the styled HTML into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-javascript-action-to-pdf-link-ann.title: Attach JavaScript Action to PDF Link Annotation
attach-javascript-action-to-pdf-link-ann.description: Opens an existing PDF, creates a link annotation on the first page, assigns a JavaScript action that displays an alert, and saves the updated document.

create-goto-link-in-pdf.title: Create GoTo Link in PDF Using TextFragment
create-goto-link-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a text fragment that functions as a hyperlink to navigate to a specific page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-clickable-text-hyperlink-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Text with Hyperlink to PDF
add-clickable-text-hyperlink-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextFragment, assign a WebHyperlink to a TextSegment, and append the linked text to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-launch-action-to-text.title: Add Launch Action to Text in PDF
add-launch-action-to-text.description: Shows how to insert a clickable text fragment into a PDF and attach a LaunchAction that opens an external file when the text is clicked.

rotate-specific-text-fragment.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF
rotate-specific-text-fragment.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text fragment with TextFragmentAbsorber, rotate that fragment by 45 degrees, and save the modified document.

insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to add a rotated TextFragment to the second page of an existing PDF document.

create-rotated-text-paragraph.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
create-rotated-text-paragraph.description: Shows how to build a TextParagraph with several TextFragments, apply a 30-degree rotation, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.title: Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in PDF
replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.description: Shows how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with another phrase using Aspose.Pdf's text absorption and replacement features.

extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages
extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a regex‑based TextFragmentAbsorber to each page, and collect email addresses found per page.

iterate-textfragment-lines-detect-line-b.title: Iterate TextFragment Lines to Detect Explicit Line Breaks
iterate-textfragment-lines-detect-line-b.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use ParagraphAbsorber to obtain markup, iterate through TextFragment lines of each paragraph, and identify lines that end with explicit line‑break characters for custom layout handling.

extract-text-fragments-line-details.title: Extract Text Fragments and Line Details from PDF
extract-text-fragments-line-details.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all text fragments using TextFragmentAbsorber, groups segments by Y‑coordinate to identify logical lines, and logs line and segment information to the console.

append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.title: Append Disclaimer to First PDF Page
append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a formatted TextFragment, and append it to the end of the first page's paragraph collection using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-header-text-pdf.title: Rotate Header Text in PDFs by 90 Degrees
rotate-header-text-pdf.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, detects header text fragments using a font‑size heuristic, rotates those fragments 90° and saves the modified documents to an output directory.

replace-text-rotate-pdf-page.title: Replace Text and Rotate PDF Page
replace-text-rotate-pdf-page.description: Loads or creates a PDF, replaces all occurrences of a word, rotates the first page, and saves the modified document into a memory stream while handling GDI+ availability on different platforms.

validate-pdf-log-text-search.title: Validate PDF and Log Text Search Actions
validate-pdf-log-text-search.description: Shows how to enable document validation logging, perform a text search with Aspose.Pdf, replace the found text, and verify that the log file was created and contains entries.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all pages' text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-line-break-positions.title: Extract Line‑Break Y Positions from PDF
extract-line-break-positions.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract multi‑line text fragments, determine the baseline Y coordinate for each line, and write those positions to a JSON file.

add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated "CONFIDENTIAL" text fragment as a watermark on every page of a PDF document.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given string only within a defined page range of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in PDF (Case‑Insensitive)
highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search a PDF for a case‑insensitive keyword using a regular expression and highlight each found instance with a colored background.

insert-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragrap.title: Insert Rotated Mixed-Style Text Paragraph on PDF Page
insert-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragrap.description: The example loads a PDF, ensures it has at least three pages, and adds a TextParagraph containing normal, bold, and italic lines on the third page. The paragraph is placed within a rectangle and rotated 45 degrees before the document is saved.

batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Text in PDFs Using Aspose.Pdf
batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a folder and replace multiple old strings with new strings using Aspose.Pdf's text absorption and replacement features.

extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text from each page, count the words using a regular expression, and write the per‑page word counts to a CSV file.

rotate-draft-text-fragments.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
rotate-draft-text-fragments.description: Shows how to locate all text containing the word "Draft" using TextFragmentAbsorber and apply a 15‑degree rotation to each found fragment before saving the PDF.

highlight-dates-in-pdf.title: Find and Highlight Dates (MM/DD/YYYY) in a PDF
highlight-dates-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, uses a regular‑expression pattern to locate all dates in MM/DD/YYYY format, highlights each occurrence, and saves the modified document.

append-multiline-textfragment-line-break.title: Append Multi-line TextFragment and Retrieve Line Break Information
append-multiline-textfragment-line-break.description: The example loads a PDF, appends a multi-line TextFragment to the first page, and iterates the fragment's segments to obtain line-break positions for custom rendering.

rotate-table-cell-text-60-degrees.title: Rotate Table Cell Text by 60 Degrees
rotate-table-cell-text-60-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate the text inside a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragment.Rotation property and save the updated layout.

rotate-pdf-title-text.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
rotate-pdf-title-text.description: Shows how to read a PDF's title metadata, locate matching text fragments, rotate them 45 degrees, and save the updated documents.

add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.title: Add Rotated Text to Bottom‑Right Corner of Last PDF Page
add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.description: The example loads a PDF, calculates a rectangle at the bottom‑right corner of the last page, and uses Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated text paragraph inside that rectangle.

replace-text-with-hyperlink-in-pdf.title: Replace Text with Clickable Hyperlink in PDF
replace-text-with-hyperlink-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a phrase in a PDF, replace it with new text, and add a clickable hyperlink annotation using Aspose.Pdf.
